code:
import io
import string

let line1 = match io.read_line() when Some(s) s when None "" end
let line2 = match io.read_line() when Some(s) s when None "" end

let toks1 = string.split_whitespace(line1)
let toks2 = string.split_whitespace(line2)

mut idx = 0
let n = toks1.len()
while idx < n
  let a_str = match toks1.get(idx) when Some(s) s when None "" end
  let b_str = match toks2.get(idx) when Some(s) s when None "" end
  let a = match string.parse_int(a_str) when Some(v) v when None 0 end
  let b = match string.parse_int(b_str) when Some(v) v when None 0 end
  let s = a + b
  println("#{a}+#{b}=#{s}")
  idx = idx + 1
end
